purpose: Same-vehicle continuity manifests for website imagery and future video generation.

sceneLock.notes: Exterior frames stay on the same wet-city tunnel-edge location in the same blue-hour lighting window. Hoist frame uses the shared dark carbon-red service-scan hoist scene.
